text.en:
If your Army Faction is **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS**, at the end of the Read Mission Objectives step, you must determine your army’s Oath for the coming battle. An Oath consists of two parts – one Deed and one Quality. There are three options for each part, shown below.

To determine your army’s Deed, you can either select one Deed or you can randomly select one Deed by rolling a D6 and consulting the relevant table below. The selected Deed will describe what needs to be achieved in order to complete that Deed.

To determine your army’s Quality, you can either select one Quality or you can randomly select one Quality by rolling a D6 and consulting the relevant table below. Until the end of the battle, the ability described in the Quality selected applies to all models in your army with this ability.

The first time your selected Deed is completed your Oath is fulfilled and, until the end of the battle, your army becomes Honoured and you gain 2CP, or 3CP if you randomly selected your Deed and/or Quality (CP gained in this way are an exemption to the Core Rules that limit the maximum number of CP you can gain per battle round to 1).
Deed
At the start of the battle, select one **CHARACTER** model in your opponent’s army. This Deed is completed at the end of a turn if that **CHARACTER** is destroyed.

title.en: We vow to lay low the tyrant...

text.en: This deed is completed at the end of your opponent’s turn if you control more objective markers than your opponent.

title.en: We swear to reclaim the realm...

text.en: This deed is completed at the end of the battle round if the number of enemy units destroyed this battle round is greater than the battle round number even if those units are subsequently returned to the battlefield (for example, two destroyed enemy units in the first battle round).

title.en: We pledge to reap a great tally...

text.en: Quality
Each time this model is selected to shoot or fight, you can re‑roll one Hit roll and you can re‑roll one Wound roll.

title.en: ...with all our martial valour risen over all.

text.en: Add 2” to this model’s Move characteristic and add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this model.

title.en: ...and we are eager for the challenge.

text.en: Improve this model’s Objective Control characteristic by 2 and its Leadership characteristic by 1.

Some **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** models have a Bondsman ability, tagged with the word ‘Bondsman’. In your Command phase, one or more models from your army with a Bondsman ability can use that ability. For each one that does, select one friendly **ARMIGER** model within 12" of that model (you cannot select an **ARMIGER** model that is already being affected by a Bondsman ability). Until the start of your next Command phase, that **ARMIGER** model is affected by that Bondsman ability.

Each time a model with this ability makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models (excluding **TITANIC** models) and sections of terrain features that are 4" or less in height. When doing so:

■ It can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them.
■ It can also move through sections of terrain features that are more than 4" in height, but if it does, after it has moved, roll one D6: on a 1, that model is Battle-shocked.

If every model in your army has the **IMPERIUM** keyword, you can include either one **TITANIC IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model or up to three **ARMIGER** models in your army, even if they do not have the Faction keyword you selected in the Select Army Faction step. None of these models can be your **WARLORD**, and they cannot be given Enhancements.
Each time an **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** unit from your army Advances, until the end of the turn, ranged weapons equipped by **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** models from your army have the **[ASSAULT]** ability.

Friendly Imperial Knights models have the following ability: Assisted Targeting (Aura): While a friendly Adeptus Mechanicus unit is within 6" of this model, that Adeptus Mechanicus unit’s ranged attacks have:
  • +1 BS.
  • [Heavy].
    • Friendly Tech‑Priest models have the following ability: Sacristan Pledge: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly Imperial Knights model within 3" of this model that has not been selected by this ability this phase. If you do, that model heals D3 wounds. Mechanicus Allies: You can include Tech‑Priest Dominus/Tech‑Priest Manipulus/Marshal/Rangers/Vanguard units in your army (see Codex: Adeptus Mechanicus). The combined points value of such units cannot exceed 500 points.
text.de:
Befreundete Imperiale-Ritter-Modelle haben die folgende Fähigkeit: Zielassistenz (Aura): Solange sich eine befreundete Adeptus-Mechanicus-Einheit innerhalb von 6" um dieses Modell befindet, haben Fernkampfattacken jener Adeptus-Mechanicus-Einheit:
  • +1 BF.
  • [Schwer].
    • Befreundete Techpriester-Modelle haben die folgende Fähigkeit: Eid der Sakristane: In deiner Befehlsphase kannst du ein befreundetes Imperiale-Ritter-Modell innerhalb von 3" um dieses Modell wählen, das in dieser Phase noch nicht für diese Fähigkeit gewählt wurde. Wenn du dies tust, wird jenes Modell um W3 Lebenspunkte geheilt. Mechanicus-Bündnis: Du kannst Dominus-Techpriester-/Manipulus-Techpriester-/Marschall-/Strahlenkrieger-/Jäger-Einheiten in deine Armee aufnehmen (siehe Codex: Adeptus Mechanicus). Der Gesamtpunktwert solcher Einheiten darf 500 Punkte nicht überschreiten.
text.es:
Las miniaturas Caballeros Imperiales amigas tienen esta habilidad: Asistente de puntería (Aura): Mientras una unidad Adeptus Mechanicus amiga esté a 6" o menos de esta miniatura, los ataques a distancia de esa unidad Adeptus Mechanicus tienen:
  • +1 a HP.
  • [Pesada].
    • Las miniaturas Tecnosacerdote amigas tienen esta habilidad: Promesa de sacristán: En tu fase de mando, puedes elegir 1 miniatura Caballeros Imperiales amiga a 3" o menos de esta miniatura que no se haya elegido para esta habilidad en esta fase. Si lo haces, esa miniatura se cura 1D3 heridas. Aliados del Mechanicus: Puedes incluir unidades Tecnosacerdote Dominus/Tecnosacerdote Manipulus/Mariscal/Exploradores/Vanguardia en tu ejército (ver Codex: Adeptus Mechanicus). El valor en puntos total de esas unidades no puede superar los 500 puntos.
text.fr:
Les figurines de Chevaliers Impériaux amies ont aptitude suivante : Ciblage Assisté (Aura) : Tant qu’une unité de l’Adeptus Mechanicus amie est à 6" ou moins de cette figurine, les attaques de tir de l’unité de l’ Adeptus Mechanicus ont  :
  • +1 en CT.
  • [Lourd].
    • Les figurines de Technoprêtre amies ont aptitude suivante :
  • Gage des Sacristains : À votre phase de Commandement, vous pouvez choisir une figurine de Chevaliers Impériaux amie à 3" ou moins de cette figurine et qui n’a pas été choisie pour cette aptitude à cette phase. Dans ce cas, la figurine choisie soigne D3 PV. Alliés de l’Adeptus Mechanicus : Vous pouvez inclure des unités de Technoprêtre Dominus/Technoprêtre Manipulus/Maréchal/Rangers/Patrouilleurs dans votre armée (voir le Codex : Adeptus Mechanicus). La valeur en points combinée de ces unités ne peut pas dépasser 500 points.
text.it:
I modelli dei Cavalieri Imperiali amici hanno la seguente abilità: Puntamento Assistito (Aura): fintanto che un’unità dell’Adeptus Mechanicus amica si trova entro 6" da questo modello, gli attacchi da tiro di quell’unità dell’Adeptus Mechanicus hanno:
  • +1 AB.
  • [Pesante].
    • I modelli di Tecnoprete amici hanno la seguente abilità: Pegno del Sacristan: nella tua fase di Comando puoi scegliere un modello dei Cavalieri Imperiali amico entro 3" da questo modello che non è stato scelto da questa abilità in questa fase. Se lo fai, quel modello guarisce D3 ferite. Alleati del Mechanicus: puoi includere unità di Tecnoprete Dominus/Tecnoprete Manipulus/Maresciallo/Ranger/Avanguardia nella tua armata (vedi Codex: Adeptus Mechanicus). Il valore in punti combinato di tali unità non può superare 500 punti.
text.ja:
味方インペリアルナイト・兵は以下のアビリティを持つ： 照準支援（オーラ）：味方 帝国技術局・ユニットがこの兵の6mv以内にいる間、その味方帝国技術局・ユニットの射撃攻撃は：
  • 【射】に+1の修正を受ける。
  • ［ヘヴィ］を持つ。
    • 味方テックプリースト・兵は以下のアビリティを持つ：
  • 聖鎧保管士の誓約：自軍側指揮フェイズ中、自軍は、この兵の3mv以内に一部でも入っており、かつこのフェイズ中にこのアビリティの対象として選択されていない味方インペリアルナイト・兵を1体選択してもよい。その選択された味方兵は、【負傷限界】をD3ポイント回復する。
    • 技術局の同盟軍：自軍はテックプリースト・ドミヌス/テックプリースト・マニプルス/マーシャル/レンジャー/ヴァンガード・ユニットを編入できる（『コデックス：アデプトゥス・メカニカス』を参照）。それらのユニットの合計ポイントコストは500ポイントを超えてはならない。
text.ko:
아군 제국 기사 모델에 다음 능력을 부여합니다. 조준 보조(오라): 아군 아뎁투스 메카니쿠스 유닛이 이 모델의 6" 내에 있는 동안, 그 아뎁투스 메카니쿠스 유닛의 원거리 공격에 다음을 적용합니다.
  • 사격 +1
  • [중화기] 부여
    • 아군 기술사제 모델에 다음 능력을 부여합니다. 성구 관리사의 맹세: 플레이어의 지휘 페이즈에, 이 페이즈에 이 능력의 대상으로 지정되지 않았으며 이 모델의 3" 내에 있는 아군 제국 기사 모델을 하나 지정할 수 있습니다. 그렇게 할 경우, 그 모델은 D3 체력을 회복합니다. 메카니쿠스 동맹: 기술사제 도미누스/기술사제 매니풀루스/마샬/추적자/전위대 유닛을 플레이어 군대에 포함시킬 수 있습니다(코덱스: 아뎁투스 메카니쿠스 참고). 이러한 유닛의 포인트 수치 총합은 500을 초과할 수 없습니다.
text.zh:
己方帝国骑士模型拥有以下技能： 辅助瞄准（光环）：在一个己方机械修会单位位于该模型的 6" 内时，那个机械修会单位的远程攻击拥有：
  • +1 BS。
  • [重型]。
    • 己方技术祭司模型拥有以下技能： 圣器司誓言：在己方指挥阶段中，您可以选择一个位于该模型 3"" 内，并且在本阶段中还没有被这个技能选为目标的己方帝国骑士模型。若这么做，那个模型治疗 D3 处耐伤。 机械修会盟友：您可以将技术祭司主宰者/技术祭司操纵者/元帅/游侠/先锋单位纳入己方军队中（参见《圣典：机械修会》）。这些单位的点数值总和不能超过 500 点。

text.en:
At the start of the first battle round, select two objective markers on the battlefield to be your foundations. When you draw a line from any part of one of your foundations to the other, if any part of a model’s base (or any part of a model’s hull, for a model without a base) crosses that line, that model’s unit is said to be on your defensive line.

While an **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** unit from your army is on your defensive line, that unit has the following ability:

**Against the Horde**: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a visible enemy unit, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll, and weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability. 

Each time one of your foundations is removed from the battlefield (e.g. by a Primary Mission rule), just after it is removed, select a new objective marker on the battlefield to be one of your foundations.

Each time a model from your army uses its Bondsman ability, if no other model from your army has used that Bondsman ability that turn, you can select up to three friendly **ARMIGER** models (instead of one) within 12" of that model, or within 15" of that model while your army is Honoured (you still cannot select a model that is already being affected by a Bondsman ability). Until the start of your next Command phase, those models are affected by that Bondsman ability.

At the start of your turn, if your current Oath is fulfilled, determine an additional Oath as described in Army Rules, with the exception that you cannot select a Deed or Quality you have already selected (if you are randomly selecting the Deed and/or Quality and roll any result that you have already selected, select a Deed or Quality you have not already selected instead). If you cannot determine an additional Oath because you have already selected each Deed and each Quality, do not determine an additional Oath.

The Qualities from Oaths you have fulfilled continue to apply to all models in your army with the Code Chivalric ability. When the Deed for an additional Oath is completed, you instead gain 1CP, regardless of how you selected the Deed or Quality.
The Enhancements in this detachment can become expended. You cannot use such Enhancements while they are expended. Each time you fulfil your Oath, each expended Enhancement is no longer expended.

While a friendly ARMIGER unit is affected by a Bondsman ability, that unit’s ranged attacks have [Ignores Cover]. This detachment has the Armigers tag and cannot be taken with another Armigers detachment.
text.de: Solange eine befreundete Knappe-Einheit von einer Edelknecht-­Fähigkeit betroffen ist, haben die Fernkampfattacken jener Einheit [­Deckung ignorieren]. Dieses Kontingent hat die Kennzeichnung Knappen und kann nicht zusammen mit einem anderen Kontingent mit der Kennzeichnung ­Knappen gewählt werden.
text.es: Mientras una unidad ARMIGER amiga esté afectada por una habilidad Siervo, sus ataques a distancia tienen [Ignora cobertura]. Este destacamento tiene la etiqueta Armigers y no puede incluirse junto a otro destacamento Armigers.
text.fr: Tant qu’une unité d’Armigère amie est affectée par une aptitude de Lige, ses attaques de tir ont [Ignore le Couvert]. Ce détachement a l’étiquette Armigères et ne peut pas être pris avec un autre détachement d’Armigères.
text.it: Fintanto che un’unità Armigero amica è influenzata da un’abilità Suddito, i suoi attacchi da tiro hanno [Ignora la Copertura]. Questo distaccamento ha il descrittore Armigeri e non può essere preso con un altro distaccamento Armigeri.
text.ja: 味方アーミジャー・ユニットが奉公人アビリティの効果を受けている間、そのユニットの射撃攻撃は［遮蔽無効］を持つ。 このデタッチメントはアーミジャーのタグを持ち、他のアーミジャータグを持つデタッチメントと同時に編制できない。
text.ko: 아군 아미저 유닛이 예속자 능력의 효과를 받는 동안, 그 유닛의 원거리 공격에 [엄폐 무시]를 부여합니다. 이 디태치먼트에 아미저 태그가 부여되며 다른 아미저 디태치먼트와 함께 선택할 수 없습니다.
text.zh: 当一个己方侍从级单位受到一个仆从技能影响时，那个单位的远程攻击拥有[无视掩体]。 本分遣队拥有侍从标签，并且不能与另一个拥有侍从标签的分遣队被一同纳入军队中。

text.en: Friendly Imperial Knights Dominus units’ attacks that target a unit in a terrain area have +1 to hit rolls.
text.de: Attacken befreundeter Imperiale-Ritter-Dominus-Einheiten gegen eine Einheit innerhalb eines Geländebereichs haben +1 auf Treffer­würfe.
text.es: Los ataques de las unidades Caballeros Imperiales Dominus amigas que tomen como blanco una unidad en un área de terreno tienen +1 a las tiradas para impactar.
text.fr: Les attaques des unités de Dominus des Chevaliers Impériaux amies qui ciblent une unité dans une zone de terrain ont +1 aux jets de touche.
text.it: Gli attacchi delle unità Dominus dei Cavalieri Imperiali amiche che hanno come bersaglio un’unità in un’area di terreno hanno +1 ai tiri per colpire.
text.ja: 味方インペリアルナイト・ドミヌス・ユニットの攻撃が地形エリア内に一部でも入っているユニットを対象とする場合、ヒットロールに+1の修正を受ける。
text.ko: 아군 제국 기사 도미누스 유닛의 공격이 지형 범위 내의 유닛을 대상으로 지정하면, 그 공격에 명중 굴림 +1을 적용합니다.
text.zh: 在己方帝国骑士统御级单位对一个位于地形区域内的单位进行攻击时，命中掷骰 +1。

text.en: **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** models from your army have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability. In addition, at the start of your Command phase, each **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model from your army regains 1 lost wound.

name.ja: 玉座に結ばれし先駆騎士

target.en: One **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, the Attacks characteristic of any armoured Feet melee weapons equipped by your model is 8, the Attacks characteristic of any titanic Feet melee weapons equipped by your model is 12, and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.

fluff.en: The Noble brings their Knight suit’s weight down with the force of an industrial piledriver, trampling their honourless foes beneath their iron tread.

target.en: One **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit on your defensive line, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

fluff.en: Drawing upon their indignant fury at a repugnant incursion into their realm, Nobles pilot their Knight suits in an aggressive purgation of the breach.

target.en: One **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, that is on your defensive line and that has not already been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Once tasked with preserving a war zone’s sanctity, a Knight will fight with unbowed destructive ferocity, unyielding in their anger while foes remain.

target.en: Up to two **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** units from your army that have not been selected to move this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, add 3" to the Move characteristic of models in your units.

fluff.en: When the cry goes up to redress their defensive positions – to shut down incursions or leave assaulting enemies flat‑footed and vulnerable – the Nobles pour power into their Knights’ servos.

target.en: One **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC** unit from your army that Remained Stationary this turn, that is on your defensive line and that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 2]** ability.

fluff.en: Like an imperious artillery captain atop their gatehouse, the Noble directs a deluge of apocalyptic firepower into the enemy’s seething tides.

target.en: One **ARMIGER** model from your army, or one **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC** model from your army, and one or more friendly **ARMIGER** models affected by that model’s Bondsman ability.

when.en: Start of the Fight phase.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit. Until the end of the phase, each time one of your **ARMIGER** models makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

fluff.en: A Knight must have the courage to face the greatest horrors of the galaxy, with duty focusing their blows.

target.en: That **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC** model, and one or more friendly **ARMIGER** models affected by that model’s Bondsman ability.

when.en: Your Shooting phase, just after an **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC** model from your army has shot.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time one of your **ARMIGER** models makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: With a fusillade upon their chosen enemy, the Bondsmen’s mentor lectures their loyal servants on the application of force to the foe’s weak points.

target.en: One **ARMIGER** model from your army, or one **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC** model from your army, and one or more friendly **ARMIGER** models affected by that model’s Bondsman ability.

when.en: Start of your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by your **ARMIGER** models have the **[RAPID FIRE 1]** ability.

fluff.en: A stentorian firing solution floods their Helms Mechanicum, and eager young Nobles shred their master’s foes in a blizzard of fury.

target.en: One **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if there are no other friendly units within 9" of your unit, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.

fluff.en: Well used to a life without allies or fire support, Freeblades operate more effectively alone.

target.en: One **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, add 2" to the Move characteristic of your models and add 2 to Advance rolls made for those model’s units.

fluff.en: With their fellows’ oaths ringing through the vox‑net and the rush of battle coursing through their veins, Noble pilots pour power into their steeds’ motive actuators and thunder onwards.

target.en: One **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC** unit from your army that is on your defensive line.

when.en: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit selects your unit as a target of a charge, that unit must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

fluff.en: Rising like towering keeps armed with threatening weapons and inscribed with heraldry proclaiming bloody victories in countless campaigns, Imperial Knights are daunting prospects to engage.

target.en: One **ARMIGER** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking units attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: Heeding the teachings of their Noble master, a Bondsman is reminded that only by enduring can they hope to discharge their sworn obligations.

target.en: One **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

fluff.en: When the night is long and the unworthy claw at one’s shield, it is chivalry and duty that buoy the soul and bolster failing strength.

target.en: One **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC** model from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time your model makes an attack that targets a **MONSTER**, **TITANIC** or **WALKER** unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

fluff.en: The greatest Knightly champions suffer no dishonourable rival to insult them for long with their existence.

target.en: That **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC** unit.

when.en: Fight phase, just before an **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC** unit from your army Consolidates.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Consolidates, models in it can move an additional 3" provided your unit can end that move within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

fluff.en: Veteran pilots waste no more time exalting their victory than the Code Chivalric demands before powering back into the fray with the long strides of the selflessly determined warrior Noble.

target.en: One **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC** model from your army that is within range of an objective marker you control.

when.en: End of your Command phase.

effect.en: Your Level of Control over that objective marker is 5 (unless it would otherwise be higher), until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

fluff.en: It is said that unalloyed heroism can purge the foulest dishonour, that the very footsteps of those of noblest purity are enough to sanctify their path.

target.en: One **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

fluff.en: To the worthiest Noble, the whispers that reach their mind from a Throne Mechanicum appear as a tapestry of virtues, standards they strive to meet with wholehearted alacrity.

target.en: One **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can target that unit with this Stratagem even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Any phase.

effect.en: Your unit’s Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 4+, adding 1 to the result if it is an **ARMIGER** unit, instead of only a 6.

fluff.en: Sensing their end drawing close, the scion overloads their Knight’s plasma core to take the enemy with them.

target.en: One **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

fluff.en: The fires of war have steeled this Freeblade’s resolve.

target.en: That **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after an **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC** unit from your army Falls Back.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

fluff.en: Death is a distant priority when heroism’s favour awaits. A breath to seize a new perspective, a new angle at which to tilt towards the foe, permits only a brief reprieve for the enemy of a true warrior.

target.en: One **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by your models have the **[LANCE]** ability.

fluff.en: With deafening challenges blaring from their emitters, honour‑bound comrades slam into their foes, where the Nobles’ martial prowess and their Knight suits’ overwhelming power are wedded to overcome the most monstrous resilience.

target.en: One **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by your models have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

fluff.en: With the swearing of cooperative pacts, Knightly companions vow to visit annihilation on their enemies in a searing barrage of retributive firepower.

target.en: One **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model from your army that is within 8" of that unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Your model can make a Normal move of up to D6".

fluff.en: The neural bond through their Throne Mechanicum enables seasoned pilots to accomplish swift counter‑manoeuvres seemingly impossible for such towering war engines.

target.en: One **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks and is on your defensive line.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

fluff.en: With a command, experienced Nobles can lock huge actuators into position, bring reserve power cells into wakefulness and shunt extra shielding into place to make their Knightly steed a bastion of defiance.

target.en: One **ARMIGER** model from your army, or one **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC** model from your army, and one or more friendly **ARMIGER** models affected by that model’s Bondsman ability.

when.en: Start of your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your **ARMIGER** models are eligible to shoot in a turn in which they Fell Back.

fluff.en: With a rapid volley of covering fire from a Noble liege, Bondsmen employ hit‑and‑run tactics at high speed.

target.en: One **ARMIGER** model from your army, or one **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC** model from your army, and one or more friendly **ARMIGER** models affected by that model’s Bondsman ability.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: For each of your **ARMIGER** models that is within 9" of one or more battlefield edges and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, remove that **ARMIGER** model from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

fluff.en: At a ritualised signal, Bondsmen encircle the foe to cut off escape, prowling onto unexpected attack routes.

target.en: One **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, when making ranged attacks with Blast weapons, models in your unit can target enemy units within Engagement Range of your unit (provided no other friendly units are also within Engagement Range of that enemy unit). In addition, until the end of the phase, your unit does not suffer the penalty to its Hit rolls for being within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, but each time a model in your unit makes an attack with a Blast weapon that targets a unit within Engagement Range of your unit, on an unmodified Hit roll of 1, your unit suffers 1 mortal wound after all of its attacks have been resolved.

fluff.en: Few can withstand the point‑blank fury of a Knight.

target.en: One **ARMIGER** unit from your army that is within 9" of one or more battlefield edges and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

fluff.en: Eager to earn glory, Knight Armigers focus on swiftly redeploying mid‑battle to flank the foe.

target.en: One **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

fluff.en: Veteran Knight pilots can swiftly re‑angle their ion shields and manipulate their energies to deflect incoming firepower.

target.en: One **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit, or 9" instead if your unit is an **ARMIGER** or **DESTRIER** unit.

fluff.en: With the enemy before them, their Knight’s machine spirit snarling, and the rush of battle coursing through their veins, this scion pours power into their motive actuators and thunders forward.

target.en: That <k>Adeptus Mechanicus</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>帝国技術局</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个 <k>机械修会</k> 单位。

when.en: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Adeptus Mechanicus unit is selected to make an advance/fall‑back move.
when.de: Deine Bewegungsphase, wenn eine befreundete Adeptus-Mechanicus-Einheit gewählt wird, eine Vorrücken-/Rückzugsbewegung auszuführen
when.es: En tu fase de movimiento, cuando una unidad Adeptus Mechanicus amiga se elige para hacer un movimiento de avanzar/de retroceder.
when.fr: À votre phase de Mouvement, quand une unité de l’Adeptus Mechanicus amie est choisie pour faire un mouvement d’avance/de retraite.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Movimento, quando un’unità dell’Adeptus Mechanicus amica viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di avanzata/ripiegamento.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ中、味方帝国技術局・ユニットが全力移動/退却移動を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 이동 페이즈, 아군 아뎁투스 메카니쿠스 유닛이 급속/후퇴 이동을 수행하기 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的移动阶段中，当一个己方机械修会单位被选中进行一次突进/后撤移动时。

effect.en: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to start an action.
effect.de: Jene Bewegung verhindert nicht, dass deine Einheit infrage kommt, eine Aktion zu beginnen.
effect.es: Ese movimiento no impide a tu unidad ser apta para iniciar acciones.
effect.fr: Ce mouvement n’empêche pas votre unité d’être éligible pour entreprendre une action.
effect.it: Quel movimento non impedisce alla tua unità di essere idonea a iniziare un’azione.
effect.ja: その移動を行った自軍ユニットはアクションの開始を宣言できる。
effect.ko: 그 이동에도 불구하고 이 유닛은 특수 행동 시작이 가능합니다.
effect.zh: 那次移动不会阻止您的单位开始一次行动。

fluff.en: With the enemy distracted by battling the mighty Knights, the servants of the Omnissiah are free to complete crucial missions unimpeded.
fluff.de: Da der Feind vom Kampf gegen die mächtigen Ritter abgelenkt ist, haben die Diener des Omnissiah freie Hand dabei, ungestört wichtigen Missionen nachzugehen.
fluff.es: Con el enemigo distraído luchando contra los poderosos Caballeros, los sirvientes del Omnissiah son libres de completar misiones cruciales sin impedimentos.
fluff.fr: L'ennemi occupé à affronter les immenses Chevaliers, les serviteurs de l'Omnimessie sont libres d'accomplir des missions cruciales.
fluff.it: Quando i nemici vengono distratti dagli attacchi dei potenti Cavalieri, i servitori dell’Omnissiah sono liberi di svolgere missioni cruciali senza impedimenti.
fluff.ja: 強大なる騎士の交戦に敵の注意が向けられるなか、万機神の従僕たちは、何者にも妨げられることなく重要任務を遂行してゆく。
fluff.ko: 적이 강대한 기사와 교전하느라 정신없는 사이, 옴니시아의 시종들이 방해받지 않고 중대한 임무를 완수한다.
fluff.zh: 在敌人忙碌于与骑士机甲交战时，欧姆尼赛亚的仆从们能够毫无阻碍地完成重要的任务。

name.fr: Vengeance du Culte de la Machine

target.en: One friendly <k>Adeptus Mechanicus</k> unit.
target.fr: Une unité de l’<k>Adeptus Mechanicus</k> amie.
target.ja: 味方<k>帝国技術局</k>・ユニット1個。
target.zh: 一个己方<k>机械修会</k>单位。

when.en: Any phase, when a friendly Imperial Knights Titanic unit is destroyed by an enemy unit.
when.de: Beliebige Phase, wenn eine titanische Imperiale-Ritter-Einheit von einer feindlichen Einheit zerstört wird
when.es: En cualquier fase, cuando una unidad Titánica Caballeros Imperiales amiga sea eliminada por una unidad enemiga.
when.fr: À n’importe quelle phase, quand une unité de Chevaliers Impériaux Titanesque amie est détruite par une unité ennemie.
when.it: In qualsiasi fase, quando un’unità Titanica dei Cavalieri Imperiali amica viene distrutta da un’unità nemica.
when.ja: いずれかのフェイズ中、味方インペリアルナイト・巨大兵器・ユニットが敵ユニットに撃破された時。
when.ko: 어느 페이즈든, 아군 제국 기사 거대 유닛이 적 유닛에 의해 파괴됐을 때.
when.zh: 任意阶段中，在一个己方帝国骑士巨型单位被一个敌方单位摧毁时。

effect.en:
That enemy unit is marked until the end of the battle:
  • While a unit is marked, friendly Adeptus Mechanicus units’ attacks that target that unit can re‑roll wound rolls.
effect.de:
Jene feindliche Einheit ist bis zum Ende der Schlacht markiert:
  • Solange eine Einheit markiert ist, können für Attacken befreundeter Adeptus-Mechanicus-Einheiten gegen jene Einheit Verwundungs­würfe wiederholt werden.
effect.es:
Esa unidad enemiga está marcada hasta el final de la batalla.
  • Mientras una unidad está marcada, en los ataques de las unidades Adeptus Mechanicus amigas que tomen como blanco esa unidad se pueden repetir las tiradas para herir.
effect.fr:
Cette unité ennemie est marquée jusqu’à la fin de la bataille :
  • Tant qu’une unité est marquée, les attaques des unités de l’Adeptus Mechanicus amies qui la ciblent peuvent relancer les jets de blessure.
effect.it:
Quell’unità nemica è marchiata fino alla fine della battaglia:
  • Fintanto che un’unità è marchiata, gli attacchi delle unità dell’Adeptus Mechanicus amiche che hanno come bersaglio quell’unità possono ripetere i tiri per ferire.
effect.ja:
バトル終了時まで、その敵ユニットは標的状態となる：
  • ユニットが標的状態である間、味方帝国技術局・ユニットの攻撃が、そのユニットを攻撃対象としている場合、ウーンズロールをリロールできる。
effect.ko:
전투가 종료될 때까지 그 적 유닛은 표적이 됩니다.
  • 유닛이 표적이 된 동안, 그 유닛을 대상으로 지정하는 아군 아뎁투스 메카니쿠스 유닛의 공격은 타격 굴림을 재굴림할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh:
直到战斗结束前，那个敌方单位被标记：
  • 在一个单位被标记时，己方机械修会单位针对那个单位进行的攻击能够重掷致伤掷骰。

fluff.en: Those who dare to fell the Machine God’s creations find themselves subject to the vengeance of the Adeptus Mechanicus.
fluff.de: Wer es wagt, die Schöpfungen des Maschinengottes zu Fall zu bringen, muss sich der Vergeltung des Adeptus Mechanicus stellen.
fluff.es: Quienes se atreven a atentar contra las creaciones del Dios Máquina sufren la venganza del Adeptus Mechanicus.
fluff.fr: Ceux qui osent faucher les créations du Dieu-Machine font l’objet de l’ire vengeresse de l’Adeptus Mechanicus.
fluff.it: Chi osa abbattere le creazioni del Dio Macchina si ritrova ad affrontare la vendetta dell’Adeptus Mechanicus.
fluff.ja: 機械神の創造物を倒さんとする者は、帝国技術局の復讐の標的となる。
fluff.ko: 기계신의 창조물에 해악을 끼치는 이들은 아뎁투스 메카니쿠스의 복수를 마주해야 할 것이다.
fluff.zh: 那些胆敢击倒万机神造物的敌人将会成为机械修会的复仇对象。

target.en: That <k>Imperial Knights</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>インペリアルナイト</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Any phase, when a friendly Imperial Knights unit suffers a mortal wound.
when.de: Eine beliebige Phase, wenn eine Imperiale-Ritter-Einheit eine tödliche Verwundung erleidet
when.es: En cualquier fase cuando una unidad Caballeros Imperiales amiga sufre una herida mortal.
when.fr: À n’importe quelle phase, quand une unité de Chevaliers Impériaux amie subit une blessure mortelle.
when.it: In qualsiasi fase, quando un’unità dei Cavalieri Imperiali amica subisce una ferita mortale.
when.ja: いずれかのフェイズ中、味方インペリアルナイト・ユニットが致命的ダメージを受けた時。
when.ko: 어느 페이즈든, 아군 제국 기사 유닛이 치명상을 입을 때.
when.zh: 任意阶段中，在一个己方帝国骑士单位受到一处致命伤时。

effect.en: Your unit has Feel No Pain 5+ against mortal wounds.
effect.de: Deine Einheit hat Verletzungen ignorieren 5+ gegen tödliche Verwundungen.
effect.es: Tu unidad tiene No hay dolor 5+ contra heridas mortales.
effect.fr: Votre unité a Insensible à la Douleur 5+ contre les blessures mortelles.
effect.it: La tua unità ha Insensibile al Dolore 5+ contro le ferite mortali.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは致命的ダメージに対する『痛みを知らぬ者5+』を持つ。
effect.zh: 您的单位针对致命伤拥有不觉疼痛 5+。

fluff.en: So resolute is their faith that the Machine God’s worshippers brave storms of killing fire, trusting in the Omnissiah to shield them from harm.
fluff.de: So vollständig ist der Glaube der Anhänger des Maschinengottes, dass sie sich in jeden Feuersturm werfen und darauf vertrauen, dass er sie vor Gefahren schützt.
fluff.es: Tan resuelta es su fe que los adoradores del Dios Máquina desafían tormentas de fuego mortífero, confiando en que el Omnissiah los protegerá de todo daño.
fluff.fr: Les adorateurs du Dieu-Machine font preuve d’une foi si résolue qu’ils bravent les grêles de tirs, convaincus que l’Omnimessie les protège.
fluff.it: Gli adoratori del Dio Macchina hanno una fede talmente forte da affrontare tempeste di proiettili, credendo fermamente che l’Omnissiah li proteggerà.
fluff.ja: 機械神の崇拝者らの信仰は確固極まるものであり、いかなる時も万機神の守護があることを疑わず、殺戮の炎嵐の中を勇敢に突き進む。
fluff.ko: 기계신의 신자들은 그 믿음이 확고하여 옴니시아의 보호를 굳게 믿고 치명적인 포화의 폭풍마저 견뎌낸다.
fluff.zh: 万机神信徒们的坚定信仰使他们能够直面冲向敌人的攻击，相信欧姆尼赛亚能够保护他们不受伤害。

target.en: One friendly <k>Imperial Knights Titanic</k> unit.
target.fr: Une unité de <k>Chevaliers Impériaux Titanesque</k> amie.
target.ja: 味方<k>インペリアルナイト・巨大兵器</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 一个己方<k>帝国骑士巨型</k>单位。

when.en: Command phase.

effect.en: Select one friendly battle‑shocked Armiger unit within 12" of your unit. That Armiger unit is no longer battle‑shocked.
effect.de: Wähle eine erschütterte befreundete Knappe-Einheit innerhalb von 12" um deine Einheit. Jene Einheit ist nicht länger erschüttert.
effect.es: Elige 1 unidad Armiger amiga acobardada a 12" o menos de tu unidad. Esa unidad Armiger deja de estar acobardada.
effect.fr: Choisissez une unité d’Armigère amie ébranlée et à 12" ou moins de votre unité. Cette unité d’Armigère n’est plus ébranlée.
effect.it: Scegli un’unità di Armigeri traumatizzata amica entro 12" dalla tua unità. Quell’unità di Armigeri non è più traumatizzata.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの12mv以内に一部でも入っており、戦闘ショック状態である味方アーミジャー・ユニット1個を選択する。選択された味方アーミジャーユニットは戦闘ショック状態ではなくなる。
effect.ko: 이 유닛의 12” 내에 있으며 전투충격 상태인 아군 아미저 유닛을 하나 지정합니다. 그 아미저 유닛이 전투충격 상태에서 벗어납니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个位于您的单位 12" 内且处于战斗震慑状态的己方侍从级单位。那个侍从级单位不再处于战斗震慑状态。

fluff.en: Noble pilots have little time for panicked or despairing bondsmen, and think nothing of enforcing stoic obedience by way of stinging neural compulsion.
fluff.de: Edle Piloten haben wenig Geduld für panische oder verzweifelte Untergebene und haben daher keine Probleme damit, ihnen über neuronalen Zwang etwas stoischen Gehorsam einzuimpfen.
fluff.es: Los nobles pilotos no tienen tiempo para esclavos aterrorizados o desesperados, y no les importa imponer una obediencia estoica mediante una punzante compulsión neuronal.
fluff.fr: Les pilotes nobles n’ont que faire des liges paniqués, et ne pensent qu’à renforcer leur obéissance par pression mentale.
fluff.it: I Nobili piloti non hanno tempo da perdere con gli allarmati sudditi, e non esitano a imporre una stoica obbedienza tramite impulsi neurali.
fluff.ja: 高貴なる操縦者は、取り乱したり意気消沈したりする奉公人たちを容赦せず、痛烈な神経刺激を与えて沈着なる従順を叩き込む。
fluff.ko: 귀족 조종사는 공포에 질리거나 절망하는 예속자에게 자비 없이 찌르는 듯한 신경 자극을 쏘아 냉정한 복종을 강요한다.
fluff.zh: 贵族驾驶员没有时间来处理陷入恐慌与绝望的侍从，他们通过神经冲动上的刺激来加强侍从们的服从心。

target.en: That <k>Imperial Knights</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>インペリアルナイト</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Command phase, when a friendly Imperial Knights unit uses a Bondsman ability.
when.de: Deine Befehlsphase, wenn eine befreundete Imperiale-Ritter-Einheit eine Edelknecht-Fähigkeit einsetzt
when.es: En tu fase de mando, cuando una unidad Caballeros Imperiales amiga usa una habilidad Siervo.
when.fr: À votre phase de Commandement, quand une unité de Chevaliers Impériaux amie utilise une aptitude de Lige.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Comando, quando un’unità dei Cavalieri Imperiali amica usa un’abilità Suddito.
when.ja: 自軍側指揮フェイズ中、味方インペリアルナイト・ユニットが『奉公人』アビリティを使用する時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 지휘 페이즈, 아군 제국 기사 유닛이 예속자 능력을 사용할 때
when.zh: 您的指挥阶段中，在一个己方帝国骑士单位使用一个仆从技能时。

effect.en: When selecting an Armiger model for that Bondsman ability, you can select one within 18" of your unit (excluding models already affected by a Bondsman ability).
effect.de: Wenn du für jene Edelknecht-Fähigkeit ein Knappe-Modell wählst, kannst du eines innerhalb von 18" um deine Einheit wählen (ausgenommen Modelle, die bereits von einer Edelknecht-Fähigkeit betroffen sind).
effect.es: Al elegir una miniatura Armiger para esa habilidad Siervo, puedes elegir una a 18" o menos de tu unidad (salvo aquellas ya afectadas por alguna habilidad Siervo).
effect.fr: Lors du choix d’une figurine d’Armigère pour cette aptitude de Lige, vous pouvez en choisir une à 18" ou moins de votre unité (sauf les figurines déjà affectées par une aptitude de Lige).
effect.it: Quando selezioni un modello di Armigero per quell’abilità Suddito, puoi sceglierne uno entro 18" dalla tua unità (esclusi i modelli già influenzati da un’abilità Suddito).
effect.ja: その『奉公人』アビリティでアーミジャー・兵を選択する時、自軍ユニットの18mv以内に一部でも入っているアーミジャー・兵を選択してもよい（ただし、すでに『奉公人』アビリティの効果を受けている兵を除く）。
effect.ko: 그 예속자 능력을 사용할 아미저 모델을 지정할 때, 이 유닛의 18" 내에 있는 모델을 지정할 수 있습니다(이미 예속자 능력의 영향을 받는 모델 제외).
effect.zh: 在为那个仆从技能选择侍从级 模型时，您可以选择位于您的单位 18" 内的一个侍从级模型（已经受到一个仆从技能效果影响的模型除外）。

fluff.en: Some longer‑serving bondsmen become so conditioned to efficient obedience by their Helm Mechanicum that they can be issued neural commands from ever‑greater distances.
fluff.de: Einige Edelknechte, die lange in den Diensten ihrer Meister stehen, sind so sehr auf den effizienten Gehorsam durch ihren Mechanicum-Helm konditioniert, dass sie neuronale Befehle über größere Entfernungen empfangen können.
fluff.es: Algunos esclavos más veteranos se vuelven tan dóciles a la obediencia por su yelmo Mechanicum que pueden recibir órdenes neuronales desde distancias cada vez mayores.
fluff.fr: Certains liges de longue date sont si soumis à l'obéissance efficiente de leur Heaume Mechanicum qu'ils peuvent recevoir des ordres neuraux d'une distance accrue.
fluff.it: Alcuni sudditi di lunga data diventano talmente condizionati all’obbedienza dall’Elmo Mechanicus che possono ricevere comandi neurali da distanze notevoli.
fluff.ja: 長きにわたり従属した奉公人たちは、機装玉冠による徹底的な神経操作を受け、はるか遠方からの神経命令にも即応できるようになる。
fluff.ko: 보다 오래 복무한 예속자는 메카니쿰 투구로 전달받는 명령에 능률적으로 복종하는 것에 익숙해져 더욱 먼 거리에서도 신경을 통해 명령을 전달받을 수 있다.
fluff.zh: 一些效忠许久的侍从能够十分高效地遵从机械头盔的命令，能够在很远的距离接收这些神经命令。

target.en: That <k>Armiger</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>アーミジャー</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly <k>Armiger</k> unit has shot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete <k>Knappe</k>-Einheit geschossen hat
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad <k>Armiger</k> amiga haya disparado.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité d’<k>Armigère</k> amie a tiré.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, dopo che un’unità <k>Armigero</k> amica ha tirato.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方<k>アーミジャー</k>・ユニットが射撃を完了した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 <k>아미저</k> 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료했을 때.
when.zh: 己方射击阶段中，当一个己方<k>侍从级</k>单位完成射击时。

effect.en: Those attacks do not prevent your unit from being eligible to start an action.
effect.de: Jene Attacken verhindern nicht, dass deine Einheit, infrage kommt, eine Aktion zu beginnen.
effect.es: Esos ataques no impiden a tu unidad ser apta para iniciar acciones.
effect.fr: Ces attaques n’empêchent pas votre unité d’être éligible pour entreprendre une action.
effect.it: Quegli attacchi non impediscono alla tua unità di essere idonea a iniziare un’azione.
effect.ja: それらの攻撃を行った自軍ユニットはアクションの開始を宣言できる。
effect.ko: 그 공격에도 불구하고 이 유닛은 특수 행동을 시작할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 那些攻击不会阻止您的单位开始一次行动。

fluff.en: Determined to prove worthy of a place in battle alongside their supposed betters, bondsmen jump to obey every command issued by their rulers.
fluff.de: Die Edelknechte sind entschlossen, sich ihres Platzes in der Schlacht an der Seite ihrer erhabenen Fürsten zu beweisen und schicken sich schnell an, jeden ihrer Befehle auszuführen.
fluff.es: Decididos a demostrar su valía en la batalla junto a sus superiores, los siervos obedecen sin reservas todas las órdenes de sus gobernantes.
fluff.fr: Déterminés à prouver qu'ils sont dignes d'une place aux côtés de leurs supposés supérieurs, les liges obéissent sur-le-champ au moindre ordre de leurs maîtres.
fluff.it: Per dare prova di meritare un posto al fianco dei campioni, i sudditi obbediscono fulmineamente a tutti gli ordini impartiti.
fluff.ja: 自らが上位の戦士たちに並び立つ存在であることを示さんと、奉公人たちは主人の命令に飛びつくように即座に従う。
fluff.ko: 예속자는 상급자와 함께 전투에 나설 자격이 있음을 증명하기 위해 지도자의 모든 명령을 적극적으로 따른다.
fluff.zh: 为了证明自己配得上与自己的主人并肩作战，侍从争先恐后地遵从每一道号令。

target.en: That <k>Imperial Knights Dominus</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>インペリアルナイト</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Imperial Knights Dominus unit is selected to move.
when.de: Deine Bewegungsphase, wenn eine befreundete Imperiale-­Ritter-Dominus-Einheit zum Bewegen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de movimiento, cuando una unidad Caballeros Imperiales Dominus amiga se elige para mover.
when.fr: À votre phase de Mouvement, quand une unité de Dominus des Chevaliers Impériaux amie est choisie pour être déplacée.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Movimento, quando un’unità Dominus dei Cavalieri Imperiali amica viene scelta per muoversi.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ中、味方インペリアルナイト・ドミヌス・ユニットが移動を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 이동 페이즈, 아군 제국 기사 도미누스 유닛이 이동 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的移动阶段中，当一个己方统御级骑士单位被选择进行移动时。

effect.en: Your unit has +2" M.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの【移】は+2mvの修正を受ける。

fluff.en: Making the most of their Knight‑suit’s twinned reactor cores, the pilot pushes its motivator‑units to their limits to gain a burst of speed.
fluff.de: Dieser Pilot holt das meiste aus den Zwillingsreaktorkernen seiner Ritterrüstung heraus und treibt den Bewegungsapparat an seine Grenzen, um einen Geschwindigkeitsschub zu erreichen.
fluff.es: Aprovechando al máximo los núcleos de reactor gemelos de su armadura de Caballero, el piloto lleva sus servomotores al límite para obtener un impulso de velocidad.
fluff.fr: En exploitant le biréacteur de son armure Chevalier, le pilote pousse ses activateurs à leur limite pour obtenir une poussée d’accélération.
fluff.it: Sfruttando al massimo i doppi reattori dell’armatura Cavaliere, il pilota spinge al limite le unità motrici per accelerare all’improvviso.
fluff.ja: 騎士甲冑の操縦者は、二基の反応炉を余すところなく稼働させ、駆動装置を限界まで追い込みながら、爆発的な速度で戦場を踏破する。
fluff.ko: 조종사가 순간적인 가속을 위해 기사 수트의 이중 반응 코어를 최대한 활용하여 동력기를 한계 끝까지 밀어붙인다.
fluff.zh: 在发挥双重反应堆的全力后，这位驾驶员将骑士的移动单元推向极限。

target.en: That <k>Imperial Knights Dominus</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>インペリアルナイト・ドミヌス</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly engaged Imperial Knights Dominus unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Imperiale-­Ritter-Dominus-Einheit im Nahkampf zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Caballeros Imperiales Dominus amiga trabada se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de Dominus des Chevaliers Impériaux amie engagée est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità Dominus dei Cavalieri Imperiali amica ingaggiata viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、接敵状態の味方インペリアルナイト・ドミヌス・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 교전 상태인 아군 제국 기사 도미누스 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的移动阶段中，当一个处于交战状态的己方统御级骑士单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en:
Your unit’s [Blast] ranged attacks:
  • Do not have [Blast].
  • Have +1 A.
effect.es: Los ataques a distancia [Área] de tu unidad: • No tienen Área. • Tienen +1 a A.
effect.fr:
Les attaques de tir à [Déflagration] de votre unité :
  • N’ont pas [Déflagration].
  • Ont +1 en A.
effect.it:
Gli attacchi da tiro della tua unità che hanno [Area]:
  • Non hanno [Area.
  • Hanno +1A.
effect.ja:
その自軍ユニットの［ブラスト］射撃攻撃は：
  • ［ブラスト］を持たない。
  • 【数】に+1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko:
이 유닛의 [폭발] 원거리 공격에 다음을 적용합니다.
  • [폭발] 제거
  • 공격 +1
effect.zh:
您的单位的[爆炸]远程攻击：
  • 不再拥有[爆炸]。
  • 拥有 +1 A。

fluff.en: It takes a skilled noble and a steady machine spirit to unleash such weaponry at point‑blank range into closing enemy threats.
fluff.de: Es braucht einen fähigen Edlen und einen standhaften Maschinengeist, um solche Waffen aus nächster Nähe gegen den Feind zu richten.
fluff.es: Se necesita un noble hábil y un espíritu máquina firme para activar tales armas a quemarropa contra las amenazas enemigas que se acercan.
fluff.fr: Il faut un noble doué et un esprit de la machine stable pour déchaîner un tel arsenal à bout portant sur les menaces qui approchent.
fluff.it: Solo i nobili più capaci e gli spiriti macchina più determinati riescono a scatenare questo arsenale a distanza ravvicinata.
fluff.ja: 接近しつつある敵に対し、至近距離でこの武器を放つには、卓越した騎士の技量と揺るがぬ機械精霊の加護が求められる。
fluff.ko: 능숙한 귀족과 침착한 기계령만이 접근하는 적 위협에 이 정도의 무기를 영거리 사격으로 발사할 수 있다.
fluff.zh: 只有娴熟的贵族驾驶员和稳重的机魂才能够在近距离对敌人使用如此强大的武器。

target.en: That <k>Imperial Knights Dominus</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>インペリアルナイト・ドミヌス</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly <k>Imperial Knights Dominus</k> unit has shot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, nachdem eine befreundete <k>Imperiale</k>-<k>Ritter</k>-<k>Dominus</k>-Einheit geschossen hat
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad <k>Caballeros Imperiales Dominus</k> amiga haya disparado.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de <k>Dominus</k> des <k>Chevaliers Impériaux</k> amie a tiré.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, dopo che un’unità <k>Dominus</k> dei <k>Cavalieri Imperiali</k> amica ha tirato.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方<k>インペリアルナイト・ドミヌス</k>・ユニットが射撃を行った時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 <k>제국 기사 도미누스</k> 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료했을 때.
when.zh: 己方射击阶段中，在一个己方<k>统御级骑士</k>单位完成射击后。

effect.en: Select one enemy unit hit by those attacks. That enemy unit makes a battle‑shock roll, with ‑1 to that battle‑shock roll.
effect.de: Wähle eine feindliche Einheit, die von mindestens einer jener Attacken getroffen wurde. Jene feindliche Einheit führt einen Erschütterungswurf mit -1 aus.
effect.es: Elige 1 unidad enemiga en la que haya impactado alguno de esos ataques. Esa unidad enemiga hace una tirada de acobardamiento, con -1 a esa tirada de acobardamiento.
effect.fr: Choisissez une unité ennemie touchée par ces attaques. L’unité ennemie choisie fait un jet d’ébranlement, avec ‑1 à ce jet.
effect.it: Scegli un’unità nemica colpita da quegli attacchi. Quell’unità nemica effettua un tiro per i traumi con -1 a quel tiro per i Traumi.
effect.ja: それらの攻撃がヒットした敵ユニットを1個選択する。選択された敵ユニットは戦闘ショックロールを行う。その戦闘ショックロールは-1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 그 공격이 명중한 적 유닛을 하나 지정합니다. 그 적 유닛이 전투충격 굴림을 수행합니다. 그 전투충격 굴림 에 -1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个被那些攻击命中的敌方单位。那个敌方单位进行一次战斗震慑掷骰，并且战斗震慑掷骰 -1。

fluff.en: So thunderous is the fire of a Dominus‑class Knight that even those who survive its salvoes are often reduced to shattered remnants cowering and praying for their lives.
fluff.de: So vernichtend ist der Beschuss durch einen Ritter der Dominus-Klasse, dass selbst die Überlebenden einer solchen Salve oft nur ängstlich bibbernde Wracks sind, die um ihr Leben flehen.
fluff.es: Tan atronador es el fuego de un Caballero de clase Dominus que quienes sobreviven a sus salvas a menudo quedan reducidos a restos destrozados, encogidos de miedo y rezando por sus vidas.
fluff.fr: Le tir d'un Chevalier de Classe Dominus est tel que ceux qui y survivent sont souvent réduits à quelques malheureux courant à couvert et priant pour leur vie.
fluff.it: Le raffiche di un Cavaliere classe Dominus sono talmente fragorose che persino chi sopravvive spesso è ridotto a un ammasso tremante che prega per la propria vita.
fluff.ja: ドミヌス級の騎士甲冑から放たれる砲火は雷鳴のごとく凄まじい。かろうじて連射を逃れた者も、その多くの戦意は瓦礫のごとく砕かれ、ただ怯えながら己の延命を祈るのみとなる。
fluff.ko: 도미누스급 기사가 내뿜는 화력은 우뢰와 같아 적이 그 포화에서 살아남더라도 전의가 산산조각난 채 엎드려서 목숨을 구걸할 수밖에 없다.
fluff.zh: 统御级骑士震耳欲聋的雷鸣炮火让那些从攻击中侥幸生存下来的敌人抱头鼠窜，祈求帮助。

name.ja: 最適化サーボマトリクス（アップグレード）

description.en: Armiger unit only. When you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch/Heroic Intervention stratagem, that use is ‑1 CP.
description.de: Nur für eine Knappe-Einheit. Wenn du die Gefechtsoption Abwehr­feuer geben/Heroische Intervention mit dieser Einheit als Ziel einsetzt, kostet jener Einsatz ‑1 BP.
description.es: Solo unidad Armiger. Cuando tomes esta unidad como blanco de la estratagema Intervención heroica/Disparos preventivos), ese uso cuesta 1 PM menos.
description.fr: Unité d’Armigère seulement. Quand vous ciblez cette unité avec le stratagème Tir en État d’Alerte/Intervention Héroïque, cette utilisation se fait à ‑1 PC.
description.it: Solo unità di Armigeri. Quando scegli questa unità come bersaglio dello stratagemma Tirare di Reazione/Intervento Eroico, quell’utilizzo costa 1 PC in meno.
description.ja: アーミジャー・ユニットのみ。自軍が、このユニットを対象に『警戒射撃』/『英雄的介入』策略を使用する場合、そのCPコストは-1される。
description.ko: 아미저 유닛 전용. 이 유닛을 경계 사격/영웅적 개입 스트라타젬의 대상으로 지정할 때, CP 소모 -1을 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限侍从级单位。在您对该单位使用英勇介入/警戒射击计谋时，那次计谋消耗的 CP ‑1。

description.en: Imperial Knights model only. While a friendly Adeptus Mechanicus unit is within 6" of this model, that Adeptus Mechanicus unit’s melee attacks have +1 WS and AP.
description.de: Nur für ein Imperiale-Ritter-Modell. Solange sich eine befreundete Adeptus-Mechanicus-Einheit innerhalb von 6" um dieses Modell befindet, haben Nahkampfattacken jener Adeptus-Mechanicus-Einheit +1 KG und DS.
description.es: Solo miniatura Caballeros Imperiales. Mientras una unidad Adeptus Mechanicus amiga esté a 6" o menos de esta miniatura, los ataques de combate de esa unidad Adeptus Mechanicus tienen +1 a HA y +1 a FP.
description.fr: Figurine de Chevalier Impérial seulement. Tant qu’une unité de l’Adeptus Mechanicus amie est à 6" ou moins de cette figurine, les attaques de mêlée de l’unité de l’ Adeptus Mechanicus ont +1 en CC et en PA.
description.it: Solo modelli di Cavaliere Imperiale. Fintanto che un’unità dell’Adeptus Mechanicus amica si trova entro 6" da questo modello, gli attacchi da mischia di quell’unità dell’Adeptus Mechanicus hanno +1 AC e +1 VP.
description.ja: インペリアルナイト・兵のみ。味方帝国技術局・ユニットがこの兵の6mv以内に一部でも入っている間、その味方帝国技術局・ユニットの白兵攻撃の【接】と【貫】は+1の修正を受ける。
description.ko: 제국 기사 모델 전용. 아군 아뎁투스 메카니쿠스 유닛이 이 모델의 6" 내에 있는 동안, 그 아뎁투스 메카니쿠스 유닛의 백병전 공격에 근접 및 관통 +1을 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限帝国骑士模型。当一个己方机械修会单位位于该模型的 6" 内时，那个机械修会单位的近战攻击拥有 +1 WS 和 AP。

name.ja: 高速駆動（アップグレード）

description.en: <k>Armiger</k> unit only. This unit has <k>Mobile</k>.
description.de: Nur für eine <k>Knappe</k>-Einheit. Diese Einheit hat <k>Mobil</k>.
description.fr: Unité d’<k>Armigère</k> seulement. Cette unité a le mot-clé <k>Mobile</k>.
description.it: Solo unità di <k>Armigeri</k>. Questa unità ha <k>Agile</k>.
description.ja: <k>アーミジャー</k>・ユニットのみ。このユニットは<k>高機動</k>を持つ。
description.zh: 仅限<k>侍从级</k>单位。该单位拥有<k>机动</k>。

description.en: Tech‑Priest model only. When using this model’s Sacristan Pledge ability, the selected Imperial Knights model heals 2 additional wounds.
description.de: Nur für ein Techpriester-Modell. Wenn dieses Modell seine Fähigkeit Eid der Sakristane einsetzt, wird das gewählte Imperiale-Ritter-Modell um 2 zusätzliche Lebenspunkte geheilt.
description.es: Solo miniatura Tecnosacerdote. Al usar la habilidad Promesa de sacristán de esta miniatura, la miniatura Caballeros Imperiales elegida se cura 2 heridas adicionales.
description.fr: Figurine de Technoprêtre seulement. Lorsque vous utilisez l’aptitude Gage des Sacristains de cette figurine, la figurine de Chevalier Impérial choisie soigne 2 PV supplémentaires.
description.it: Solo modelli di Tecnoprete. Quando usi l’abilità Pegno del Sacristan di questo modello, il modello di Cavaliere Imperiale scelto guarisce 2 ferite addizionali.
description.ja: テックプリースト・兵のみ。この兵の『聖鎧保管士の誓約』アビリティを使用する時、選択されたインペリアルナイト・兵の【傷】は2ポイント回復する。
description.ko: 기술사제 모델 전용. 이 모델이 성구 관리사의 맹세 능력을 사용할 때, 지정된 제국 기사 모델이 2의 체력을 추가로 회복합니다.
description.zh: 仅限技术祭司模型。在使用该模型的圣器司誓言技能时，被选择的帝国骑士模型治疗额外 2 点耐伤。

name.ja: 技術遺産たる自動装填器（ルビ、自動装填器：オートローダー）

description.en: Imperial Knights Dominus model only. This unit can re‑roll rolls to determine the A of a weapon.
description.de: Nur für ein Imperiale-Ritter-Dominus-Modell. Diese Einheit kann Würfe wiederholen, um die A einer Waffe zu bestimmen.
description.es: Solo miniatura Caballeros Imperiales Dominus. Esta unidad puede repetir las tiradas para determinar los A de un arma.
description.fr: Figurine de Dominus des Chevaliers Impériaux seulement. Cette unité peut relancer les jets pour déterminer les A d’une arme.
description.it: Solo modelli di Dominus dei Cavalieri Imperiali. Questa unità può ripetere i tiri per determinare la caratteristica A di un’arma.
description.ja: インペリアルナイト・ドミヌス・兵のみ。このユニットは武器の【数】を決定する際のダイスロールをリロールできる。
description.ko: 제국 기사 도미누스 모델 전용. 이 유닛이 무기의 공격을 정하는 굴림을 재굴림할 수 있습니다.
description.zh: 仅限统御级骑士模型。该单位在判断武器的 A 时可以进行重掷。

description.en: Imperial Knights Dominus model only. This model has +1 T.
description.de: Nur für ein Imperiale-Ritter-Dominus-Modell. Dieses Modell hat +1 W.
description.es: Solo miniatura Caballeros Imperiales Dominus. Esta miniatura tiene +1 a R.
description.fr: Figurine de Dominus des Chevaliers Impériaux seulement. Cette figurine a +1 en E.
description.it: Solo modelli Dominus dei Cavalieri Imperiali. Questo modello ha +1 R.

description.en: **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model only. At the end of your Movement phase, select one other **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model from your army that is within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That selected model regains up to D3 lost wounds, or up to 3 lost wounds if your army is Honoured.

**IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model only. At the end of your Movement phase, select one other **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model from your army that is within 12" of and visible to the bearer. Until the start of your next Movement phase, that selected model has the Stealth ability.

**IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one other **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model from your army that is within 12" of and visible to the bearer. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by that selected model have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.

**IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model only. At the start of your Charge phase, select one other **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model from your army that is within 12” of and visible to the bearer. Until the end of the phase, you can re‑roll Charge rolls made for that selected model.

**IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model only. While the bearer is on your defensive line and there are no enemy units on your defensive line, add the bearer’s Objective Control characteristic to that of each model affected by the bearer’s Bondsman ability.
**IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, if the bearer is on your defensive line, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.
**IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model only. Each time the bearer makes a ranged attack, while the bearer is on your defensive line, weapons equipped by the bearer have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.
**IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model only. Once per turn, you can target the bearer with the Tank Shock Stratagem for 0CP.

**IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model only. When the bearer ends a Charge move, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, this Enhancement is expended, then each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

**IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model only. In your Shooting phase, when the bearer is selected to shoot, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, this Enhancement is expended, then until the end of the phase, each time it makes an attack that targets a unit that can **FLY**, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

**IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model only. When the bearer is selected to fight, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, this Enhancement is expended, then until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by the bearer have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 2]** ability.

**IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model only. When the bearer is selected to fight, after resolving its attacks, if one or more enemy units were destroyed by those attacks, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, this Enhancement is expended, then select one enemy unit that is not within Engagement Range of any units from your army and is within 12" of and visible to the bearer. Roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

**IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model only. While two or more **ARMIGER** models are under the effects of the bearer’s Bondsman ability, each time each of those **ARMIGER** models makes an attack, you can re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.

**IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model only. While two or more **ARMIGER** models are under the effects of the bearer’s Bondsman ability, melee weapons equipped by those **ARMIGER** models have the **[PRECISION]** ability.

**IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model only. While two or more **ARMIGER** models are under the effects of the bearer’s Bondsman ability, each time one of those **ARMIGER** models makes a melee attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll and/or the Wound roll.

**IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model only. While two or more **ARMIGER** models are under the effects of the bearer’s Bondsman ability, once per turn, you can target one of those **ARMIGER** models with the Counter‑offensive Stratagem for 0CP.

**IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model only. The bearer has the Deep Strike ability. Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if the bearer is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, remove the bearer from the battlefield. In the Reinforcements step of your subsequent Movement phase, set the bearer up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9” horizontally away from all enemy units. If the battle ends and the bearer is not on the battlefield, it is destroyed.
**IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model only. The bearer has a 5+ invulnerable save.
**IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model only. Improve the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 2, and each time the bearer makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.
**IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model only. Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.
Each time an attack is made with this weapon, if the target is more than 18" away from the bearer, an unmodified successful Hit roll of 4+ scores a Critical Hit.

Each time this model makes an attack that targets a **VEHICLE**, improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that attack by 1 (if that attack targets a **FORTIFICATION**, improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that attack by 2 instead).
While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** 2 Asterius volkite culverins; karacnos mortar battery; 2 twin conversion beam cannons; titanic feet.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Like its cousin the Porphyrion, the gigantic Acastus Knight Asterius is a relic of a lost technological age. Armed with a pair of twin conversion beam cannons, a karacnos mortar battery and two volkite culverins, the Asterius is capable of sundering the walls of mighty fortresses and clearing ramparts with a hail of high-explosives, its thick armoured hide making it near impervious to weapons fire.

description.en: Each time this model Remains Stationary, until the end of the turn, ranged weapons equipped by this model have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.
While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

This model’s 2 Acastus autocannons can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 2 lascannons ◦ 1 Acastus autocannon and 1 lascannon

fluff.en: One of the most heavily armed and armoured of all Knight chassis, the Acastus Knight Porphyrion approaches even the war machines of the Collegia Titanica in size and power, and reigns supreme against any foe not equipped with dedicated countermeasures. The Porphyrion’s giant torso supports a pair of twin magna lascannons, amongst other weapons, capable of obliterating the mightiest armoured targets.

description.en: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) hit by one or more of those attacks made with an Armiger autocannon. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
While this model has 1‐5 wounds remaining, subtract 3 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** 2 Armiger autocannons; Questoris heavy stubber; armoured feet.

wargear.en: This model’s Questoris heavy stubber can be replaced with 1 meltagun.

fluff.en: From flanking positions, vanguard fire points and while loping forward in ambush, these fast‑moving Knight suits lay down hails of heavy fire. Amongst Helverins’ key strategic roles are enfilading fire, scouting and suppression fire, using their autocannons to fire hundreds of shells per minute, and vow‑bonded packs of these war engines can shatter an enemy assault in seconds.

description.en: Each time an attack is made with this weapon, if the target is more than 18" away from the bearer, an unmodified successful Hit roll of 4+ scores a Critical Hit.

You can target this unit with the **Heroic Intervention stratagem**, regardless of any other uses of that **stratagem** this phase. If you do:

▪ That use is -1 CP.
▪ That use does not prevent any uses of that stratagem on other units this phase.
While this model has 1‐5 wounds remaining, subtract 3 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

This model’s volkite veuglaire can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 siege claw and 1 rad cleanser ◦ 1 graviton pulsar ◦ 1 lightning lock ◦ 1 conversion beam cannon

fluff.en: While larger breeds of Knight are optimised for frontal assaults, tank-hunting and fortress-breaking, the smaller and more nimble Armiger Moirax is a natural skirmisher, able to speed ahead of more ponderous war machines and engage vulnerable targets. Armiger Moirax can be fitted with a range of esoteric energy weapons, all extremely effective but almost impossible to replace or repair.

description.en: Each time this model makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s reaper chain‑cleaver – strike profile, and add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s reaper chain‑cleaver – sweep profile.
While this model has 1‐5 wounds remaining, subtract 3 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

wargear.en: This model’s Questoris heavy stubber can be replaced with 1 meltagun.

fluff.en: Armiger Warglaives are nimble and purposeful Knights, possessing exceptional speed that allows them to outpace most vehicles. Eager for glory, their Bondsmen pilots aggressively prowl battlefields ahead of their masters. Their agility, alongside weapons that can melt and carve through heavy armour, make them fearsome hunters of enemy war engines and hulking monstrosities.

description.en: Once per turn, you can target this model with a Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem in the same phase.
Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly **IMPERIUM** unit that is Battle‑shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle‑shocked.

If your Canis Rex model is destroyed, this model is treated as a model disembarking from a destroyed **TRANSPORT** and must perform an Emergency Disembarkation. Sir Hekhtur cannot be selected as the target of any of your Stratagems other than Core Stratagems. Your Canis Rex unit is not considered to be destroyed until Sir Hekhtur is also destroyed.
While this model has 1-9 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **Canis Rex is equipped with:** las-impulsor; Questoris multi-laser; Freedom’s Hand.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Canis Rex is the last unsullied remnant of House Cerberan. Under the expertise of its pilot, Sir Hekhtur, Canis Rex has become a vaunted legend. The ferocity – and, at times, apparent intuitive autonomy – of its machine spirit makes the Knight deadly on the battlefield. With pulsating volleys of laser ordnance and crushing sweeps of its huge gauntlet, enslaving oppressors are mercilessly crushed.

description.en: While a model is affected by this ability, at the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result when they do.

In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with an Acheron flame cannon. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: The Cerastus Knight Acheron is a war machine designed not only to destroy, but also to inspire terror. Armed with a fearsome reaper chainfist, twin heavy bolters and an Acheron-pattern flame cannon, they are employed as weapons of extermination, and nothing will sway them from their grim task until the enemy is utterly crushed.

description.en: While a model is affected by this ability, each time that model makes an attack that targets a **TITANIC** or **TOWERING** model, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.
Each time this model makes an attack that targets a **MONSTER** or **VEHICLE** unit, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that target is **TITANIC** or **TOWERING**, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: One of the rarest and most potent Knights, the Atrapos was created early in the Great Crusade to carry particularly rare and powerful weaponry with a single goal in mind – the destruction of heretic and xenos war machines. Knights Atrapos are said to carry with them a cold and all-destroying hunger, and to pilot one is thought to be to court madness.

In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) hit by one or more of those attacks. wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Armed with the fearsome Castigator-pattern bolt cannon, the Knight Castigator scythes down massed infantry formations in a thunderous rain of bolts, wiping out hordes that might overwhelm other patterns of Knight by their sheer numbers. Its path cleared, the Knight Castigator then strides forward to carve apart light vehicles or monstrous chitinous beasts with its tempest warblade.

fluff.en: The Lancer is the most widely known variant of the swift and agile Cerastus chassis. Equipped with a potent shock lance and an ion gauntlet shield, Knights Lancer are perfectly suited to duelling titanic foes face to face, and often bound ahead of the main battle line to vanquish the enemy’s most prized war machines in single combat.

fluff.en: Built upon a Dominus‑class chassis, the Knight Castellan’s dual plasma core fuels an array of weapon systems that make it among the foremost artillery Knights of the houses. The combined fire of several of these engines can equal that of an Imperial Navy warship battery, and tear the heart out of an enemy army.

fluff.en: Armed with a bristling array of heavy and long‑ranged weapons, the Knight Crusader secures key firing positions and unleashes salvo after salvo at the enemy. The pilots of Knights Crusader will gladly steer their suits even into open ground to find the best place to shoot from and are regarded as especially dutiful and selfless by their peers.

fluff.en: Knights Defender use artefacts incorporating ancient technology in the selfless protection of their allies. With barely understood weapons, their pilots fire super‑heated bolts that detonate with stellar brightness and beams that explosively transmute matter into energy, while the rippling mantle of a void shield wards their allies from harm.

fluff.en: The Knight Destrier is agile and fleet-footed. Employing rocket thrusters, skilled pilots are able to lend greater speed to their charge, tearing into the foe with thundershock spears or reaper chainswords before mowing down what remains of their shattered enemies with hails of chastiser gatling rounds or explosive munitions from their frag bombards.

fluff.en: These aggressive, close‑range assault Knights excel at hunting and slaying enemy tanks and war beasts. They plunge aggressively into the fiercest fighting, unleashing hissing blasts of super‑heated energy and deadly sweeps of their huge combat weapon. Theirs is a ceaseless hunt; they move on to new targets while melted ruin cools behind them.

fluff.en: Gallants are the most restless and combative of Knights, with machine spirits described as impetuous and beyond bellicose. Their pilots are aggressive and bold, sometimes difficult to restrain and reckless in their fearless ferocity to close with the foe and demonstrate their devastating power in close‑quarters honour duels.

fluff.en: These highly versatile Knights provide the strategic backbone to many lances. While not specialised, they are favoured by most houses for their combination of rapid‑fire battle cannon, a direct‑firing artillery gun and a powerful close‑combat weapon. Seasoned Nobles prize these suits.

fluff.en: Knights Preceptor embody the Code Chivalric. Their pilots close to an honourable range with the foe, engage with a respectful force and kill them with efficiency deserving of their status. Typically, grizzled veterans pilot these Knights, setting an example for their younger comrades by hunting down the most fearsome enemies.

fluff.en: This looming Knight defeats the Imperium’s enemies through overwhelming firepower at close range. Amidst its barrage of cannon fire and missile strikes, it unleashes an inescapable firestorm that can annihilate incoming hordes or smash through opposing battle lines, while with its crackling harpoon, it can destroy far larger behemoths with impunity.

fluff.en: With an avenger gatling cannon that spits hundreds of foot‑long armour‑piercing shells per minute, these Knights are well suited to annihilating enemy infantry, light vehicles and transports. The suits themselves possess strong‑willed machine spirits, and it is a great mark of accomplishment for a Noble to pilot one.

fluff.en: The Knight Magaera is a marvel of lost technology, ranging from its repair auto-simulacra to its nigh impregnable ionic flare shield. These esoteric devices make the Magaera ideally suited to shock assaults and breaching actions, enabling the Knight to surge through the most heavily defended positions unscathed and eradicate its foes with terrifying blasts from its lightning cannon.

description.en: While a model is affected by this ability, each time that model is selected to shoot or fight, after it has resolved all of its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks - that unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting one from the test when doing so.

In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if an enemy **INFANTRY** unit was hit by one or more of those attacks made with a graviton crusher, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is grav-pinned. While a unit is grav-pinned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that unit.
While this model has 1-9 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** graviton crusher; volkite chierovile; reaper chainsword.

wargear.en: This model’s reaper chainsword can be replaced with 1 hekaton siege claw and 1 twin rad cleanser.

fluff.en: The Knight Styrix is a highly sophisticated machine meticulously designed for the eradication of infantry and supporting vehicles. Blasts from the Styrix’s integral graviton gun pin hapless targets in place, while scything volkite beams and flesh-boiling rad-cleanser discharges reap a heavy toll of lives.

description.en: If your Canis Rex model is destroyed, this model is treated as a model disembarking from a destroyed **TRANSPORT** and must perform an Emergency Disembarkation. Sir Hekhtur cannot be selected as the target of any of your Stratagems other than Core Stratagems. Your Canis Rex unit is not considered to be destroyed until Sir Hekhtur is also destroyed.

loadout.en: **Sir Hekhtur is equipped with:** Hekhtur’s pistol; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Once a prisoner of the Iron Warriors, Sir Hekhtur resisted agonising torture and escaped only through sheer faith, determination and honour. Now he travels the galaxy, liberating Imperial citizens enslaved by the forces of the Arch‑enemy.
